# Verbatim appendix (optional) — paste into curated lecture

Use at the **end** of `lectures/<series>-<NN>-<slug>.md` when you need **caption-faithful** excerpts without storing the full transcript in git (full raw files stay under `youtube-channels/predictive-history/transcripts/`, gitignored).

Replace placeholders before saving.

---

## Verbatim excerpt (from captions)

**video_id:** `XXXXXXXXXXX`  
**Source file:** `research/external/youtube-channels/predictive-history/transcripts/` (local; run fetch CLI)  
**Verified:** YYYY-MM-DD (operator) — compared to captions / listen at timestamps below.

### Excerpt 1 (~MM:SS–MM:SS)

```text
Paste caption or ASR text exactly as pulled (no editorial cleanup),
or paste a short block if you normalized only whitespace.
```

### Excerpt 2 (optional)

```text
…
```

**Notes:** e.g. manual caption vs auto-caption tier, one unclear word marked `[unclear]`.

---

Guidance: see [ASR-VERIFICATION-RUBRIC.md](../ASR-VERIFICATION-RUBRIC.md).
